text.title: task-creation-parallelization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for task-creation-parallelization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Task too large: greater than 100k tokens or greater than 4 subtasks in one task file.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Context overflow causes forgotten requirements and inconsistent implementations.

failure-mode.description: Vague acceptance criteria: "registration should work" instead of Given-When-Then with specific values.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents cannot verify completion against vague criteria and produce implementations that pass the agent's interpretation but not the actual requirement.

failure-mode.description: Missing dependency tree: Wave 2+ task has no summaries from Wave 1 dependencies.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each execution agent starts fresh; without explicit patterns from prior waves, naming conventions and error handling diverge.

failure-mode.description: Tasks sharing a file in the same wave.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Parallel git worktree execution produces merge conflicts when two agents modify the same file simultaneously.

failure-mode.description: The Monolith Task: one task for the entire feature.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Exceeds context window; cannot parallelize; progress is invisible; rollback is all-or-nothing.

failure-mode.description: The Micro-Task: separate tasks for import statement, function signature, function body.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Coordination overhead exceeds implementation time; each task lacks sufficient context to make meaningful decisions.

failure-mode.description: The Circular Dependency: TASK-001 depends on TASK-002 which depends on TASK-001.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Deadlocks wave execution; fix by extracting the shared dependency into a new Wave 1 task.

failure-mode.description: The Missing Context: implementation task with no dependency tree and no related-files section.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent starts fresh without pattern context; produces naming and error handling inconsistent with prior waves.

failure-mode.description: The Vague AC: "AC-1: registration should work".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent cannot verify completion; implements to its own interpretation rather than the actual requirement.
